meta.title: Custom IEM — personalised in-ear monitors | Soundz
meta.description: In-ear monitors custom-moulded to your ear: studio-grade sound and isolation for musicians, audio engineers and audiophiles.

hero.title: For the stage. Exactly for your ear.
hero.lead: Monitors custom-moulded from your ear impression — accurate stage sound, reliable isolation and hours of comfort. The choice of musicians, audio engineers and audiophiles.

process.title: From impression to finished monitor — 4 steps
process.lead: Each monitor is made under specialist supervision to your ear's anatomy.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: We define needs, genre and use — stage or studio.

steps.title: Ear impression
steps.text: The audiologist safely takes an accurate ear impression.

steps.title: Manufacture
steps.text: The shell and acoustics are custom-built from the impression.

steps.title: Fitting
steps.text: We check fit and sound, tuning if needed.

features.title: How it differs from universal earphones

items.title: Custom mould
items.text: Moulded exactly to your ear — no pressure, never falls out.

items.title: Studio sound
items.text: A multi-driver configuration gives accurate, rich, balanced sound.

items.title: Passive isolation
items.text: Outside noise is naturally blocked — clean monitoring even quieter.

items.title: Hearing protection
items.text: Lower volume — safer for your hearing on stage.

gallery.title: Design and finished work
gallery.lead: You can choose shell colour, translucency and finish. (Sample looks — real work coming soon.)

items.title: Musicians
items.text: Hear your voice and instrument clearly on stage without monitor speakers.

items.title: Audio engineers
items.text: Reference-grade monitoring — reliable for mixing and soundcheck.

items.title: Audiophiles
items.text: Top quality and comfort for everyday listening.

items.a: No. The audiologist takes an accurate impression in minutes with safe material.

items.q: How many drivers do I need?
items.a: It depends on genre and needs — we pick the best option at the consultation.

meta.title: Online hearing check — in 2 minutes | Soundz
meta.description: Assess your hearing for free based on everyday situations. This is not a diagnosis — the result points you to a specialist check.

hero.title: How's your hearing? Find out in 2 minutes
hero.lead: Answer 8 everyday-life questions — we'll show whether your hearing may need attention.
points: Your result is private and confidential

hearingCheck.disclaimer: Note: this is a screening, not a diagnosis, and does not replace medical advice. Only an audiologist can give an accurate assessment.

start.title: Ready?
start.lead: Pick the answer that fits you best for each question. There are no right or wrong answers.

questions: Do you often ask people to repeat what they said?
Is it hard to follow conversation in a noisy place (restaurant, market)?
Is it hard to understand words on the phone?
Do people say you turn the TV or radio up too loud?
Is it hard to tell who said what when several people talk?
Are women's or children's voices harder to hear?
Do you get ringing or buzzing in your ears?
Do people notice that your hearing has gotten worse?

result.disclaimer: This result is not a diagnosis. It's based only on everyday signs. A professional check will determine your actual condition.

low.title: Few signs
low.body: No serious signs so far. As a precaution, it's worth checking your hearing once a year.

moderate.title: Some signs present
moderate.body: You have difficulty in some situations. We recommend an audiologist assessment to know your exact status.

high.title: Several signs present
high.body: There are noticeable difficulties in daily life. Please get a specialist assessment — early evaluation gives the best outcome.
